title: odontarrhena singarensis
intro: Odontarrhena singarensis, also known as Singareni's toothache plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to the Eastern Ghats of India. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating toothaches and other oral health issues. The health benefits of Odontarrhena singarensis include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its antimicrobial properties that help prevent infections. Odontarrhena singarensis is often used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, and can be consumed as a tea or applied topically to affected areas.
